stories.headline: UN Security Council Votes on New Sanctions Amid Eastern European Tensions
stories.summary: The UN Security Council passed new sanctions against a nation involved in regional conflict, aiming to de-escalate hostilities and prevent wider war.

stories.headline: Global Tech Leaders Agree on AI Ethics Framework at Summit
stories.summary: Major tech companies and governments signed a landmark agreement on AI development and deployment ethics, setting global standards for responsible innovation.

stories.headline: US Federal Reserve Signals Rate Hikes Pause Amid Stabilizing Inflation
stories.summary: The US Federal Reserve indicated a potential pause in interest rate hikes following new data showing inflation stabilizing, boosting market confidence.

stories.headline: New Malaria Vaccine Shows 90% Efficacy in Phase 3 African Trials
stories.summary: A novel malaria vaccine demonstrated unprecedented efficacy in large-scale trials across Africa, offering hope for combating a leading cause of death.

stories.headline: Extreme Heatwave Grips South Asia, Prompting Emergency Measures
stories.summary: An unprecedented heatwave continues to affect millions across South Asia, leading to power outages and health warnings, highlighting climate change impacts.
